parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "conversation_id": "{{ $('Supabase - Get Or Create Conversation').first().json.id }}",
  "contact_id": "{{ $('Supabase - Upsert Contact').first().json.id }}",
  "direction": "inbound",
  "type": "text",
  "intent": "desconhecida",
  "sentiment": "neutro",
  "provider": "evolution_api",
  "provider_message_id": "{{ $('Normalize Evolution Payload').first().json.providerMessageId }}",
  "content": "{{ $('Normalize Evolution Payload').first().json.text }}",
  "raw_payload": {{ JSON.stringify($('Normalize Evolution Payload').first().json.rawPayload) }},
  "metadata": {
    "instance": "{{ $('Normalize Evolution Payload').first().json.instance }}",
    "remote_jid": "{{ $('Normalize Evolution Payload').first().json.remoteJid }}"
  }
}

={
  "conversation_id": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.conversation_id }}",
  "contact_id": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.contact_id }}",
  "direction": "outbound",
  "type": "text",
  "content": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.handoffMessage }}",
  "provider": "evolution_api",
  "intent": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.intent }}",
  "sentiment": "neutro",
  "raw_payload": {
    "source": "handoff_static_reply",
    "intent": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.intent }}",
    "reason": "{{ $('Prepare Handoff WhatsApp Message Body').item.json.aiPausedReason }}"
  }
}
